rationale: Both reviews correctly judge the PR generality (natural bialgebra-to-Hopf extension of Mathlib's convolution monoid, no over/under-generalization in main results or mapValue). Review 2's sole finding (missing symmetric antipode_id_convMul lemma) is a real but trivial nit unneeded for inv_mul_cancel, instGroup or the stated results; acting on it yields no maintainer-valued improvement under the rubric.
